top_signals.title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu puts Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Cass sees freight volume recovery in second half of year
top_signals.summary:
Cass data released Monday pointed to the likelihood of a second-half volume recovery as truckload linehaul rates surged again in May.

The post Cass sees freight volume recovery in second half of year appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock gains 19% in first full day of trading after record debut
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trading last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
